3e6d00f62e743acb.description: The HPE MRSA Storage Administrator (HPE MRSA) software is a web-based application that enables multiple users to perform monitoring, maintaining, troubleshooting, and configuration functions for the MegaRAID® products. The MRSA graphical user interface (GUI) makes it easy for you to view the existing server hardware configuration. It also helps you to create and manage storage configurations. The software displays the status of the controller cards, virtual drives, and drives on the controller.

Smart Array Advanced Pack 1.0 and 2.0 features are now part of the baseline features of SSA, with the appropriate firmware.
